title: 24pc Cutlery Dinner Set – Includes Metal Forks, Teaspoons, Spoons & Plastic Drainer Stand | Storage Organiser | Durable Strong & Long Lasting | Suitable for Home, Kitchen, Restaurant, Catering
features: ✔️ DISHWASHER SAFE - The Polished Design Makes It Very Easy To Clean, Dishwasher Safe And Suitable For Family Dinners, Party Or Restaurants.
✔️ MULTI PURPOSE - These Cutlery Sets Are Perfect For Family Daily Use, Also Suitable For Restaurant, Hotel, Festivals, Wedding, Travelling, Camping, Party, Catering, Etc.

✔️ ERGONOMICALLY DESIGNED - Unique yet extraordinary, sleek handle designed to provide more firm grip for children and adults alike. This stainless steel set has a sturdy construction, no need to worry about bending.
✔️ SET INCLUDES - 6x forks, 6x knives, 6x large spoon, 6x small spoon & 1x stand
